title: delphinium forrestii var. viride
intro: Delphinium forrestii var. viride is a variety of the Delphinium forrestii plant, commonly known as Forrest's larkspur, which is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Delphinium forrestii var. viride include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, coughs, and skin irritations.
